gates.name: Stage order integrity
checks: any skipped stages have activation justification in manifest

gates.name: Consumes exist and validate
checks: before stage starts: all consumes artifacts exist
before stage starts: consumes validate against schema_ref

gates.name: Produces complete
checks: if stage status==succeeded then all produces artifacts exist
if stage status==succeeded then produces validate against schema_ref

gates.name: Stage report emitted
checks: exactly one stage_report per executed stage
stage_report.inputs/outputs align with manifest artifact refs

gates.name: Run manifest coherence
checks: stage timeline aligns with emitted stage reports
artifact entries align with stage outputs

gates.name: Rerun/resume invariants
checks: stage_rerun respects can_rerun and invalidation rules
